title: IREN Full Year FY24 Results Summary
text: IREN reported record results for the fiscal year ended June 30, 2024. The company achieved record adjusted EBITDA of $54.7 million, compared to $1.4 million in FY23, representing substantial year-over-year growth. Mining operations drove significant revenue growth, with the company generating record Bitcoin mining revenue of $184.1 million, as compared to $75.5 million in fiscal year 2023. The firm successfully mined 4,191 Bitcoin during the period, up from 3,259 the prior year. The company maintains a strong balance sheet with cash and cash equivalents of $404.6 million as of June 30, 2024 and no debt facilities. Operating cash flow improved substantially to $52.7 million from $6.0 million previously. IREN is expanding its computing infrastructure with 816 NVIDIA H100 GPUs for AI Cloud Services, generating $3.1 million in revenue. The company secured additional mining hardware and aims to achieve 30 EH/s in 2024, with 15 EH/s currently installed. The market reacted positively, with IREN stock gaining 14.82% on the announcement day.
